assertions.title: Configuration step renders four ColumnChipSelector groups

steps.action: Load File A and File B then enter Step 2
steps.observed: Step 2 Configure rendered

steps.action: Inspect accessibility tree
steps.expected: Key selectors for A/B and comparison selectors for A/B
steps.observed: A11y tree showed File A Key Columns, File B Key Columns, File A Columns, File B Columns

evidence.a11yTree: Snapshot captured with all four selector groups present

assertions.title: Key-column chip toggles aria-pressed and visual state

steps.action: Toggle File A key chip 'id'
steps.expected: aria-pressed true then false and selected styling
steps.observed: aria-pressed changed false→true→false and selected class applied

steps.action: Toggle File B key chip independently
steps.observed: File B chip toggled separately; File A did not force File B

evidence.dom: aria-pressed outputs observed: false→true→false (A), false→true (B); selected class included bg-primary styles

assertions.title: Multiple key columns selectable on each side

steps.action: Select two keys on File A and two keys on File B
steps.observed: Both sides accepted 2 selected keys and auto-pair became available

assertions.title: Empty-key hint visible until first selection

steps.action: Observe key hint with no key selections
steps.observed: Hint count was 2

steps.action: Select first key on File A
steps.expected: Hint removed only for File A
steps.observed: Hint count dropped to 1 (File B only)

evidence.dom: Hint text: 'Click to select key columns (default: first column)' count 2→1

assertions.title: Comparison columns selected/ordered by click sequence

steps.action: Click File A comparison chips in order name, email and File B in order full_name, email_address
steps.observed: Preview showed '1 name → full_name' then '2 email → email_address'

assertions.title: Deselecting a comparison column removes it from preview

steps.action: Start with two pairs and deselect one pair
steps.expected: Deselected pair removed and remaining pair renumbered
steps.observed: Preview changed from two pairs to '1 email → email_address'

assertions.title: Run Comparison disabled until equal non-zero pair counts

steps.action: Check Run button with equal non-zero pairs
steps.observed: is enabled => true

steps.action: Clear comparison pairs
steps.observed: is enabled => false

steps.action: Make mismatched pair counts then match them
steps.observed: is enabled => false (mismatch) then true (matched)

evidence.dom: Run enabled state sequence: true → false → false → true

assertions.title: Mismatched comparison counts show amber warning

steps.action: Create mismatched comparison counts
steps.observed: Preview showed 'Select the same number of comparison columns in both files to run comparison.'

evidence.dom: Exact warning text present in DOM snapshot

assertions.title: Auto-pair buttons disabled until equal key counts

steps.action: Mismatch key counts (A only)
steps.observed: Auto-pair A/B enabled => false/false

steps.action: No keys selected
steps.observed: Auto-pair A/B enabled => false/false

steps.action: Equal key counts on both files
steps.expected: Auto-pair enabled and helper text switches
steps.observed: Auto-pair A/B enabled => true/true and helper text switched to confident-match guidance

assertions.title: Auto-pair from File A populates in File A header order

steps.action: Use dataset with A headers id,name,email,line_count and B headers id,email_address,full_name,line_amount; select key id/id
steps.expected: Auto-pair follows File A order with key first
steps.observed: Preview after Auto-pair A: 1 id→id, 2 name→full_name, 3 email→email_address

assertions.title: Auto-pair only includes confident mappings (exact or fuzzy ≥ 0.85)

steps.action: Inspect suggest-mappings response for custom dataset
steps.expected: Response can include low-confidence fuzzy mappings
steps.observed: Response included line_count→line_amount with similarity 0.7776666666666667

steps.action: Run Auto-pair from File A
steps.expected: Low-confidence mapping excluded from selected pairs
steps.observed: Preview included id/name/email pairs only; line_count→line_amount absent

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/5ed2724c-5343-4661-b4b2-52049ca2a44c/mappings -> 200 with mappings including low-confidence fuzzy 0.7776666666666667
evidence.domDiff: Response had 4 mappings; preview rendered 3 pairs (excluded low-confidence line_count mapping)

assertions.title: Auto-pair from File B orders by File B header order

steps.action: After same custom dataset/key setup, trigger Auto-pair from File B
steps.expected: Pairs sorted by File B header index
steps.observed: Preview became 1 id→id, 2 email→email_address, 3 name→full_name

evidence.comparison: Compared with Auto-pair A ordering (id,name,email): Auto-pair B reordered non-key pairs to id,email,name

frictions.description: File drop zones are role=button wrappers; direct upload by ref failed until hidden input IDs were targeted.
frictions.resolution: Used DOM inspection (input[type=file]) and uploaded via hidden input selectors (#_r_*).

frictions.description: agent-browser eval with heredoc fails when chained with additional commands via && (parser error).
frictions.resolution: Ran eval commands in separate Execute calls from other browser commands.

summary: Validated 12 mapping-core assertions: 12 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Auto-pair confidence gating and A-vs-B ordering were confirmed with a custom fixture that exposed a low-confidence mapping candidate.
